ai_broadened_results_alert: Ua hŇć Ľike mńĀkou i nńĀ hopena ńĀkea no ka mea e pono paha kńĀu noi i nńĀ kiko Ľńę hou aku. Hiki ińĀ  Ľoe ke ho Ľomaika Ľi me ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i nńĀ kumuhana a i  Ľole nńĀ ‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äčmana Ľo.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_info: Ua hŇć Ľike mńĀkou i nńĀ hualoa Ľa ńĀkea no ka mea e pono paha kńĀu hulina i nńĀ kiko Ľńę hou aku. Hiki ińĀ  Ľoe ke ho Ľomaika Ľi me ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i nńĀ kumuhana a i  Ľole nńĀ ‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äčmana Ľo.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_confidenc: Ua hŇć Ľike mńĀkou i nńĀ hopena ńĀkea no ka mea  Ľa Ľole mńĀkou i hilina Ľi e pili ana i ka ho ĽokŇękŇę maika Ľi loa. Hiki ińĀ  Ľoe ke ho Ľomaika Ľi me ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i nńĀ kumuhana a i  Ľole nńĀ ‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äčmana Ľo.
